# datahub_corp_group_member (Resource)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Manages a single membership edge: one user's membership in one native DataHub group.

Following the HashiCorp idiom, each membership is its own resource rather than a list on the group. This lets group definitions and membership bindings be composed and owned independently, and lets memberships be added or removed without rewriting the whole group.

Membership is stored on the user (the `nativeGroupMembership` aspect), so this resource targets **native** groups created in DataHub. It is not intended for IdP-synced groups, whose membership is owned by your identity provider.

## References

Prefer expression inputs so Terraform orders operations correctly: set `group_urn` to `datahub_corp_group.<name>.urn` and `user_urn` to `data.datahub_corp_user.<name>.urn`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "datahub_corp_group" "data_platform" {
  group_id = "data-platform"
  name     = "Data Platform Team"
}

# Resolve an existing user to its URN (the provider does not create users).
data "datahub_corp_user" "alice" {
  username = "alice"
}

# Bind the user to the group. One resource per membership edge.
resource "datahub_corp_group_member" "alice_data_platform" {
  group_urn = datahub_corp_group.data_platform.urn
  user_urn  = data.datahub_corp_user.alice.urn
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `group_urn` (String) Full URN of the group (e.g., `urn:li:corpGroup:data-platform`). Changing this forces a new resource.
- `user_urn` (String) Full URN of the user (e.g., `urn:li:corpuser:alice`). Changing this forces a new resource.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Composite identifier: `<group_urn>|<user_urn>`.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
# Import by composite ID: <group_urn>|<user_urn>
terraform import datahub_corp_group_member.alice_data_platform 'urn:li:corpGroup:data-platform|urn:li:corpuser:alice'
```
